---
title: "Evaluation of antimicrobial photodynamic therapy with erythrosine and blue light emitting diode for inactivation of Aggregatibacter actinomycetemcomitans"
date: 2025-04-14
author:
  - name: Latorre, Joaquin Isper
  - name: Gonçalves, Marcela Letícia Leal
  - name: González, Carolina Stéfani Wince
  - name: Kassa, Claudio Teruo
  - name: Rodriguez, Mikelhy Silva
  - name: Tortamano, Ana Carolina A. C.
  - name: Magalhães, Fabiana Divina
  - name: Kato, Ilka Tiemy
  - name: Bussadori, Sandra Kalil
  - name: Prates, Renato Araujo
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Lasers in Medical Science"
  volume: 40
  issue: 1
  doi: "10.1007/s10103-025-04434-7"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Evaluation of antimicrobial photodynamic therapy with erythrosine and blue light emitting diode for inactivation of Aggregatibacter actinomycetemcomitans</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
